content.text: Start with one CMS entry for your landing page. Its path is fixed to an empty string so it always resolves to /.

body.code:
app/
╰ page.tsx

entries/
╰ landing/
  ├ LandingPage.tsx
  ╰ LandingPage.schema.tsx

cms.tsx

content.text: Start by defining the landing entry schema in its own file.
Then build the rendering component and infer its data type directly from that schema.
Register the landing schema in cms.tsx and seed the initial homepage entry.
Finally, fetch that homepage entry in the route and pass it to the landing view.
